creator: Anastasia D’Amario | High Protein Recipes
source_text:
One pan. 15 minutes. Maximum flavor! 🔥

Bare Minimum Meals, Episode 10: Creamy Tomato Parm Shrimp Orzo Skillet 🍤🍅🧀

If eating healthy still looks like dry chicken and plain rice… let me change your life. 👀

This easy one-pan dinner pairs juicy shrimp with rich, cheesy tomato-Parmesan orzo infused with garlic butter. It packs 39 g of protein and tastes better than anything you’d order at a restaurant! 🙌🏼

Comment “need this” and I’ll send you the recipe card! 💌

•

#healthyrecipes #easyrecipes #mealprep #highproteinmeals #onepanmeal

expected.name: Creamy Tomato Parm Shrimp Orzo Skillet

notes: Agent-labeled from the frozen Instagram description before viewing parser output.
The explicit episode line names the dish, but both ingredients and method remain behind a comment-to-DM call to action.
Accepted exactly with the existing creator-independent parser; no parser change was needed.
